EGFR_PACC.mechanism: Atypical structural alterations leading to variable TKI binding.
EGFR_PACC.citation: Le X, et al. FURTHER: A Global, Randomized Study of Firmonertinib.

HER2_Resistance.mechanism: Antibody-Drug Conjugate (ADC) payload resistance; tumor remains sensitive to kinase inhibition.
HER2_Resistance.trial_recommendation: Switch to HER2 TKI like Sevabertinib (Evaluate via SOHO-02 Trial)
HER2_Resistance.citation: Le X, et al. First Comprehensive Investigation of ADC Resistance Mechanisms in Lung Cancer.

MET_Amplification.mechanism: Bypass track activation leading to EGFR TKI escape.
MET_Amplification.trial_recommendation: Osimertinib + MET Inhibitor (e.g., INSIGHT-2 trial logic)
